title: Long-output output-match validation for real datasets
status: auxiliary/provisional because Qwen2.5-7B could not be run under current GPU availability
why_qwen7b_not_run_now: GPU0 has only about 8.4 GiB free due unreleased memory; GPUs 1/2 are occupied by another user vLLM worker; GPU3 is running another user training job.
max_tokens_4_evidence: phase1_runs/20260506_221907_real_kv_int8_error_qwen7b_16k/run.sh contains --max-tokens 4 for NarrativeQA, HotpotQA, and ShareGPT.
The corresponding narrativeqa.log/hotpotqa.log/sharegpt.log PHASE*_CONFIG rows contain "max_tokens": 4.
interpretation_en: Low mean absolute KV error does not guarantee exact long-output match. On Llama-3.2-1B, NarrativeQA 16K generated 64 tokens naturally and diverged after retrieval from INT8 base cache, while HotpotQA 8K still matched exactly. Therefore long-output quality must be validated at the target model/dataset/output length, especially for Qwen2.5-7B 16K/64-token runs.
interpretation_zh: 较小的平均 KV 绝对误差不能直接推出长输出一定完全匹配。Llama-3.2-1B 上，NarrativeQA 16K 自然生成 64 token，INT8 base cache 取回后的 followup 输出发生明显分歧；HotpotQA 8K 则仍然完全匹配。因此必须在目标模型、目标数据集和目标输出长度上单独验证，尤其还需要补 Qwen2.5-7B 16K/64-token。
